offer: For law firms processing 10-50 legal documents/month, inefficient document retrieval causes delays in case preparation. We convert legal documents into searchable digital archives instead of manual filing and searching through physical documents.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for legal document help
Indie Hackers discussions on document management
DM outreach to law firms with demo video
Community forums for law firms sharing resources
try_it: Let users try document scanning on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used inputs as templates
Allow CSV import for existing documents
